posts.title: Product Name — 1
posts.mobiledoc:
{"version": "0.3.1", "atoms": [], "cards": [["html", {"html": "

Somewhere between the brief and the deadline lives the actual work. This is generic demo content so you can judge the layout honestly.

The setup

Every good system starts with a constraint: frame the color 1:1, crop out the noise.

  • Start with the audience, not the tool
  • Measure twice, publish once
  • Delete more than you add

The details

const frame = (life) => life.filter(m => m.signal > m.noise);
Life looks better when you frame the color 1:1.

Wrap up

If this reads well in all six theme modes, ship it.

"}]], "markups": [], "sections": [[10, 0], [1, "p", []]]}
posts.custom_excerpt: Generic product 1 — I use it, I like it, affiliate link inside.
